title: Quran, Sura 3: Al Imran
description: Sura 3 (Al Imran: The Family of Imran) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 3 (Al Imran: The Family of Imran) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: God — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. He sent down upon you the Book in truth, confirming what was before it. And He sent down the Torah and the Gospel before, as guidance for the people.
